productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown Formal Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these desert boots    from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality materials makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  The leather uppers and the tapered toe box makes this perfect for semi-formal occasions as well. Team it with jeans, tees and cargo jackets for a rugged look.Upper Leather uppers  for comfort and protection Stitch detailing for added style and  reinforcement Lace-ups for a snug Fit Stylized tapered toe box for a semi-formal look Leather lining for greater comfort Midsole Padded footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole vertically textured to offer maximum grip on smooth surfaces Heel for ergonomic fit with horizontal stripes for greater grip shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
